title: FLF: New User Persistence
description: FreeLabFriday-inspired hunt for attacker persistence through account creation. Windows Event ID 4720 is surfaced with host, account, and source context for triage.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Event Security Logs') and 'Event ID' = '4720' | stats count as NewUsers by 'Host Name (Server)', User, 'Source IP' | sort -NewUsers

ask_ai_prompts: Which newly-created account looks suspicious and why?
Pivot to privilege assignment, group membership, and logon events around this account creation.

references.name: Black Hills InfoSec FreeLabFriday Labs - New User Added
